__readme__: Kairos people import (Timeline → Import people). Required: top-level array "people". Optional: "source" (label only). You may delete __readme__ before importing; the importer only uses "people" and "source". Each row POSTs a timeline event (person or ruler) then saves a PersonProfile in the browser. CANONICAL SHAPE: slug, timeline_event, profile (see first example). FLAT SHAPE: slug, eventId, name, scope, and optional fields on the same object (see Jesse example); timeline_event is built for you. profile.scope: "bible" | "church_history" ("OT" / "NT" are accepted as bible). profile.figureKind: king | prophet | priest | disciple | apostle | angel | region | other. scriptureAppearances: { "book": "Genesis", "chapter": 1 } — book must match Kairos canon names. loreCards: { kind: item|clothing|place|event, title, body }. loreCallouts: { title, body }. atlasPin: { catalogMapId (workspace map id, e.g. ws-05-the-land-of-canaan), nx, ny } with nx/ny in 0–1 on the plate image. familyLinks (two styles): (1) On the row or nested profile: [{ "type": "spouse|parent|childof|siblingof|ancestorof", "targetEventId": "slug" }] where targetEventId matches another row's slug, eventId, or name (same pack, resolved after all rows import). (2) Inside profile only: [{ "relation": "parent|child|spouse|sibling|other", "personEventId": "<existing timeline UUID>" }]. imageDataUrl: full data URL string or omit/null. relatedEventIds: timeline event UUIDs already in your library.
source: Example people pack — replace with your dataset name

timeline_event.title: David
timeline_event.description: King of united Israel; psalmist; covenant line.

profile.name: David
profile.title: King of Israel
profile.biography: Shepherd of Bethlehem; defeats Goliath; reigns from Hebron then Jerusalem.

loreCards.title: Sling
loreCards.body: Five smooth stones at the brook against Goliath.

loreCards.title: Linen ephod
loreCards.body: Danced before the ark when the ark came to Jerusalem.

loreCards.title: Ziklag
loreCards.body: Among the Philistines while fleeing Saul.

loreCards.title: Mourns Saul and Jonathan
loreCards.body: Song of the bow; refuses to strike Saul.

loreCallouts.title: After God's own heart
loreCallouts.body: Narrative arc from shepherd to king; repentance after Bathsheba.

people.name: Jesse
people.title: Father of David
people.biography: Ephrathite of Bethlehem; eight sons per 1 Samuel 16–17.

timeline_event.title: Polycarp of Smyrna
timeline_event.description: Bishop; martyrdom at Smyrna recorded by the church.

profile.name: Polycarp of Smyrna
profile.title: Bishop of Smyrna
profile.biography: Disciple of John the apostle; burned at the stake c. 155.
